name: PEAK
short_description: PEAK is a co-op climbing game where the slightest mistake can spell your doom. Either solo or as a group of lost nature scouts, your only hope of rescue from a mysterious island is to scale the mountain at its center. Do you have what it takes to reach the PEAK?

name: The Social Grip: Llama Drama
short_description: The Social Grip: Llama Drama offers an immersive, second-person experience where strategy and quick-thinking are critical. Will you be able to guide Dan the Llama safely through Trig's offices?

name: Subnautica
short_description: Descend into the depths of an alien underwater world filled with wonder and peril. Craft equipment, pilot submarines and out-smart wildlife to explore lush coral reefs, volcanoes, cave systems, and more - all while trying to survive.

name: Speed Creators
short_description: A high speed multiplayer platformer where players separately create a small level, which combine into a massive final course, then race through it in one mad dash to the finish line. Combine movement altering blocks with deadly traps to create something your friends won't forget!

name: YAR: Forgotten Throne
short_description: YAR is a fully-fledged open-world RPG. Embark on a heartfelt journey inspired by Boreyian myths and legends, filled with vibrant and unforgettable adventures, uncover the mystery behind the attempt to conquer the noble Boreyian people.

name: Candy Bandits
short_description: Outsmart your friends in this chaotic 4-10 player team-based heist! Whether you're a Guardian protecting your sweets or a Bandit planning a getaway, use wild gadgets and traps to secure 30 candies. Work together to win, but expect plenty of hilarious chaos along the way.

name: ALL WILL FALL
short_description: Build massive ocean cities and lead your people to prosperity in this post-apocalyptic survival colony sim. Featuring a physics-based 3D construction system, complex resource management, exploration, difficult political decisions, supply chains, and a robust sandbox mode.

name: Harvest Cafe
short_description: Explore, grow, repair and cook delicious food! Harvest Cafe combines an open-world adventure with a restaurant business simulation, giving you the opportunity to enjoy farm life.

name: Rogue Night
short_description: Gather, build, explore, quest, and survive a zombie apocalypse that is set in a medieval fantasy world. Unlock permanent upgrades with the heads of zombies.

name: Slay the Spire 2
short_description: The iconic roguelike deckbuilder returns. Craft a unique deck, encounter bizarre creatures, and discover relics of immense power in Slay the Spire 2!

name: Toyful Wonderworld
short_description: A retro first-person game inspired by shooters of the 90s. Collect weapons and blast your way through the mysterious Toyful Wonderworld, where a cast of colorful enemies will stand in your way. Discover the secrets of this weird place and find out what has caused the Toyfriends to go crazy!

name: TheMute
short_description: Fix audio gear, earn upgrades, and step into Tone City! Wield musical card combos, clash with discordant sounds, and restore harmony to the city. Team up with friends, unlock powerful upgrades, and embark on an epic journey. After all, what beats the perfect mix of music and friendship?

name: ChessBoyChess
short_description: chess...expect no more,no less.

name: Roguefall
short_description: Roguefall is an action rogue-lite following a lost player guided by the enigmatic Overseer to scavenge a world forgotten by humanity. Fight, explore, collect, and fall until you reach the final machine: 0VR5R.

name: A Little Perspective
short_description: A Little Perspective is an abstract, perspective-based puzzle game where perception and reality are one and the same.

name: Mini Worlds Dioramas
short_description: A peaceful sandbox for building tiny worlds. Mini Worlds Dioramas is your digital Zen garden—no goals, no stress, just pure creativity. Mix and match cozy props from different genres to craft your own calming dioramas.

name: RACCOIN: Coin Pusher Roguelike
short_description: A coin-pushing dopamine machine. RACCOIN is a roguelike deckbuilder where you combine special coins with powerful items to trigger wildly satisfying combos. Stack shiny towers, spin the lucky wheel, and shake the machine until all the coins drop.

name: Dangerous Mountain Together
short_description: Team up in this chaotic 2-4 player co-op car adventure! Navigate dangerous mountain roads while tethered together, pulling each other back from disaster. Climb steep hills, survive wild weather, and reach the top without tumbling into the abyss!

name: My Ghost Roommate
short_description: A romantic comedy visual novel where you move in with Juno, a shy ghost bound to your new apartment. Share awkward dinners, heartfelt moments, and maybe spark a supernatural romance in this short, charming story of love and letting go.

name: Super Battle Golf
short_description: An online 1-8 player golf game where everyone plays at the same time. Swing, shoot, sabotage, and finish first by any means necessary in a free-for-all rush to the hole.
